subject: chemistry
title: 19M.1.HL.TZ1.31
question_html:
Which is not a requirement of the standard hydrogen electrode (SHE)?

A. V = 1 dm3

B. p(H2) = 100 kPa

C. use of platinum as the electrode material

D. [H3O+] = 1 mol dm−3
examiners_html: This was a poorly answered question on the standard hydrogen electrode. Many candidates believed what was not required was a Pt electrode material
